title: Assistant Director, Stakeholder Engagement
description:
Shape Singapore’s EV Charging Future

EV-Electric (EVe) Charging Pte Ltd, a subsidiary of the Land Transport Authority of Singapore (LTA), is driving the nationwide rollout of electric vehicle (EV) charging infrastructure. From upgrading electrical systems to deploying charging points across Singapore’s residential carparks, our work supports a cleaner, more sustainable transport ecosystem for all.

We are looking for an Assistant Director, Stakeholder Engagement to play a critical role in bringing people, partnerships, and projects together—accelerating charger deployment while delivering an excellent charging experience for users across Singapore.

Your Role

You will work at the heart of EVe’s operations, managing complex stakeholder relationships and translating engagement into tangible outcomes.

  • Lead engagement with key stakeholders including Advisers, Town Councils, partners, and members of the public.

  • Drive timely and effective resolution of customer feedback, enquiries, and complaints in line with service standards.

  • Support the execution of charger deployment and electrical infrastructure upgrade plans through strong partnerships.

  • Chair stakeholder meetings, align expectations, and advance constructive conflict resolution.

  • Enhance the EV charging customer experience by identifying operational gaps and user pain points, and working with internal teams to improve processes and workflows.

  • Monitor service performance, KPIs, and standards to ensure consistent service excellence.

What You Bring

You are a confident leader and trusted partner who thrives in multi-stakeholder, fast-evolving environments.

  • Proven ability to influence and engage stakeholders through strong networks, adaptable communication, and credible, consistent engagement.

  • A collaborative working style that values respect, inclusivity, and alignment across functions.

  • Strong business acumen, with awareness of EV and mobility trends and the ability to translate strategy into execution.

  • An innovative mindset—comfortable experimenting with new approaches and driving continuous improvement.

  • A data-driven approach to decision-making, grounded in insights and evidence.

  • Demonstrated people leadership skills, with the ability to develop teams, provide constructive feedback, and build a high-performance culture.

  • A growth mindset, openness to feedback, and resilience in navigating challenges and change.

  • Agility and adaptability to manage shifting priorities and operate effectively in dynamic environments.

Requirements

  • Tertiary qualification with at least 10 years of relevant experience in partnerships, service delivery and/or stakeholder engagement or customer relations, including strong people management experience.

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office applications.

  • Experience in public service or community partnerships, customer experience (CX), and/or the engineering or transport services sector will be an advantage.

Why Join EVe

  • Be part of a national-level initiative with real impact on Singapore’s sustainability goals.

  • Work closely with public agencies, industry partners, and communities.

  • Lead meaningful change at scale in a growing and future-focused sector.

If you are passionate about stakeholder engagement, service excellence, and shaping the future of urban mobility, we invite you to join us and make a difference. ⚡🚗

postedCompany.description:
Empowering Journeys.    


Are you passionate about shaping the future of transportation? Do you want to be at the forefront of the electric vehicle (EV) revolution in Singapore? Look no further! 


We are the people behind Singapore’s public EV charging infrastructure, fully owned and financially backed by Land Transport Authority (LTA). We are fully dedicated to build a sustainable future by expanding the infrastructure for electric vehicles. As the demand for clean energy transportation continues to soar, we're seeking talented individuals to join our team to accelerate the transition to a greener transportation system.
postedCompany.name: EV-ELECTRIC (EVE) CHARGING PTE. LTD.
